Package com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.crypto

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AlgorithmParameters
    Algorithm parameters used for symmetric key generation or data encryption/decryption.
    AsymAlgorithmParameters
    Algorithm parameters used for asymmetric key generation or data encryption/decryption.
    CipherOutput
    The result of data encryption/decryption.
    CSRParameters  
    MACOutput
    The result of MAC generation.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    AsymCryptoMode
    Asymmetric crypto mode.
    AsymEncodingMode
    Encoding mode for asymmetric keys.
    CipherType
    Cipher type.
    CSRFileType  
    KCVMode
    KCV mode.
    MACMode
    MAC mode.
    MACType
    MAC type.
    MessageDigestType
    Message digest type.
    PaddingMode
    Padding mode.
    TR34EncodingMode
